workflows.label: Warehouse / fulfillment / parcel / 3PL
workflows.whyNow: Bay Area robot teams still care about brownfield warehouse and parcel environments, especially when proof needs to be technically inspectable fast.

workflows.label: Advanced manufacturing / electronics / robotics production
workflows.whyNow: The Bay Area keeps a denser robotics and advanced manufacturing ecosystem than Austin, which makes manufacturing-adjacent exact-site proof strategically important.

workflows.label: Industrial inspection and utility environments
workflows.whyNow: Inspection remains a live workflow category for technical robot teams and gives strong exact-site review value.

workflows.label: Port, cargo, and airport logistics
workflows.whyNow: Oakland and SFO-adjacent logistics environments are strong exact-site and adjacent-site proof lanes for logistics robotics buyers.

workflows.label: Labs, demo facilities, and technical pilot environments
workflows.whyNow: Useful for high-trust buyer discovery, but lower priority than commercially real logistics and manufacturing sites.

immediateTop25.name: Oakland airport logistics corridor
immediateTop25.exactSiteValue: Very high. Strong Bay Area logistics proof lane.
immediateTop25.sourceNote: Bay Area cargo and warehouse corridor with strong workflow relevance.

SFO cargo and support facilities

immediateTop25.name: Santa Rosa industrial and warehouse belt
Robotics integrator customer sites reached through BARA-style networks
immediateTop25.workflowFit: real deployments across manufacturing and logistics
immediateTop25.exactSiteValue: High if surfaced. Better as named account-linked sites than blind city sweep.
immediateTop25.sourceNote: Directly ties the capture ledger to active buyer threads.

immediateTop25.name: Partner-introduced exact-site facilities from Bay Area deployment teams
immediateTop25.workflowFit: site-specific proof work for active buyers
immediateTop25.exactSiteValue: Very high when present. These should jump the queue.
immediateTop25.sourceNote: Should outrank broad prospecting whenever a real buyer thread exists.
